content.verdict: Capella Sydney opened in March 2023 inside the meticulously restored 1912 Department of Education sandstone building on Bridge Street. 192 rooms, an Auriga Spa with the original sandstone basement transformed into a 20-metre indoor pool with vaulted brick arches, and the McRae Bar in the original Cabinet Room. Sydney's CBD luxury answer to Park Hyatt's harbor-view crown — different vibe, more discreet, more design-led.
content.best_room: Premier Grand Suites (90 m², from $2,000/night) have the Cabinet Room aesthetic — heritage windows, freestanding tubs, Sennheiser Bluetooth. Premier Suites (the entry suites, 70 m²) are the value-luxury choice. The Capella Suite (the master, 220 m², $8k+/night) is the Sydney celebration room.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival in Sydney
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into SYD. 25-min taxi to Bridge Street. Personal assistant escort to your suite. Welcome champagne in the heritage corridor. Dinner at McRae Bar followed by Brasserie 1930 — Tasmanian oysters, Murray cod, Margaret River Chardonnay.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Sydney CBD walk + Opera House
itinerary_7_nights.description: Walking tour of CBD heritage architecture (Capella's pamphlet is excellent). Lunch at Bennelong (Opera House restaurant). Afternoon BridgeClimb. Sunset cocktails at Aria. Late-night swim in Capella's vaulted basement pool — the most Instagrammed spa pool in Sydney.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Bondi to Bronte coastal walk
itinerary_7_nights.description: Uber to Bondi (15 min). Coastal walk Bondi → Bronte → Coogee (6km). Lunch at Three Blue Ducks. Afternoon at Bondi Icebergs ocean pool. Return to the hotel for the signature Auriga couples' ritual (90 min). Dinner at Brasserie 1930.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Manly ferry day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Ferry to Manly from Circular Quay (10-min walk from the hotel). Lunch at Hugos. Afternoon swim at Manly Beach. Return ferry at sunset. Dinner at Quay (4-min walk from hotel).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Hunter Valley wine day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private day-trip to Hunter Valley (2.5h drive each way). Vineyard lunch at Bistro Molines. Tastings at Brokenwood, Tyrrells, Audrey Wilkinson. Return for late dinner in your suite.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa day + opera evening
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full Auriga Spa day — couples' Sodashi ritual, basement pool soak, sandstone steam room. Lunch at Brasserie 1930. Evening at the Sydney Opera House for a contemporary show. Post-show supper at McRae Bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell breakfast & departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final breakfast at Brasserie 1930 — house-made croissants, smoked Tasmanian salmon, native finger lime. Walk to Circular Quay for last harbour photos. 25-min taxi to SYD.

caveats: Bridge Street location is CBD — quieter at night than The Rocks, walking distance to Circular Quay (10 min).
No harbor view from rooms (this is a heritage-building hotel, not a harbor-front one).
Premier Suites are spread across multiple floors — request middle-floor for quietest position.
Restaurant scene around the hotel is excellent but business-district timing applies (dinner after 7pm).
Indoor pool is 20m but quite popular at peak times; book a cabana for privacy.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes for couples who want design-led heritage luxury in a city setting. The Auriga Spa and basement pool, the McRae Bar atmosphere, and the Brasserie 1930 dining are all honeymoon-worthy. Less iconic than Park Hyatt for the Opera House view.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: September–November and March–May are perfect Sydney shoulder seasons. December–February summer is festive but humid. Winter (Jun–Aug) is mild and discounted.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 3–4 months for Premier Grand Suites; 6+ months for the Capella Suite. Less competition than Park Hyatt for the same period.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — full-service Capella with families and business travellers.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Premier Grand Suite for the Cabinet Room aesthetic and freestanding tub. Premier Suite for value.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Fly to Sydney (SYD). 25-min taxi or train to Bridge Street CBD.
